name: channel-message-flows
tagline: Runs OpenClaw QA Lab commands to verify Telegram draft/final message delivery sequencing.
verdict: Small, low-risk skill: two precise, well-scoped CLI invocations against the repo's own QA harness, no network egress or destructive operations. Weak spots are hygiene only — no scope-exclusion guidance and no version/changelog signal, neither a safety concern.
